message:
fix: Token ID 0 bug and double-free in tokenizer

- Use NO_OUTPUT sentinel (maxInt(u32)) instead of 0 for "no output"
  in Aho-Corasick automaton. Token ID 0 ('!') was being incorrectly
  dropped because 0 served dual purpose as sentinel and valid ID.

- Fix double-free in deinit(): vocab and vocab_r share the same
  string memory, only free from vocab (keys).

- Fix JSON API: json.parse(allocator, buffer), json.Value type.

Verified: !, ?, hello, "hello world\ntest\n" now match tiktoken exactly.
